Start free

Prompts

Prompts that describe the job of the image

Good creator prompts are specific, but they do not need to sound technical. Describe what the image should show and why it matters.

Subject

Who or what is in the image.

Action

What they are doing, not only how they look.

Setting

Where the scene takes place and what supports the story.

Use

Campaign concept, storyboard frame, character reference, or social post.

Creative direction

A mature anime art director painting a digital mural in a clean studio, side view, warm monitor light, focused hands, cinematic composition
Two creators reviewing character sheets on a table, one pointing at a pose reference, modern production studio, warm daylight

Story worlds

A fantasy mage casting a protective spell over a bridge, wind moving the cloak, glowing runes, heroic scene, safe for work anime style
A cyberpunk engineer repairing a robot arm in a neon workshop, sparks, tools, side angle, active work scene

Everyday and travel

A cozy apartment kitchen scene, character cooking ramen, steam, warm evening light, candid action frame
A spaceship pilot checking cockpit controls, stars outside the window, focused expression, cinematic dashboard light
A creator taking photos in a night market, lanterns, food stalls, camera raised, candid movement

Action

A martial arts training scene with wooden practice swords, respectful dojo, motion blur, warm cinematic light
Try a prompt
